heading: Config Server Change Criteria
body:
If you enable Atlas-managed config servers, Atlas determines the initial
cluster config server type as follows:

- If the cluster shard count is greater than three,
  Atlas uses a dedicated config server.

- If the cluster shard count is three or less, Atlas
  uses an embedded config server.

When you add or remove shards with Atlas-managed config servers enabled,
Atlas automatically re-selects your sharded cluster's config server
type using the same criteria.
